items.title: Snowball
items.summary: Built a personal habit tracking app and launched on the iOS App Store
details: Built an app from the ground up using React Native and Expo

items.title: Trane Technologies: Copper Price Modeling
items.summary: Built and tested machine learning approaches to improve copper price forecasting for the Global Procurement team.
details: Researched and integrated new data sources into an existing dataset.
Ran feature and model experiments to evaluate incremental accuracy gains.
Delivered a reusable automation tool for future variable testing.

items.title: UST Matriculation Forecasting
items.summary: Built a generalized linear model to predict student enrollment likelihood using 6 years of admissions data.
details: Defined and validated predictors linked to enrollment decisions.
Collaborated in a team setting to structure the analysis pipeline.
Achieved a high-accuracy predictive model for final course delivery.

items.title: DataCom 2022 Research Competition
items.summary: Investigated mental health and physical activity relationships using CDC survey data in a competitive research setting.
details: Formulated a testable research question with measurable variables.
Evaluated data quality constraints and survey ambiguity impacts.
Presented findings and methodological limitations with clear framing.
